title: Emirality
description: Emirality - add-on that adds new tools and blocks from emeralds.
body:
**This add-on will add new emerald tools, as well as many emerald blocks and decorations.**

Also, in the overworld, pallets with boxes can now generate, from which emeralds fall out, which makes them easier to mine.
_[Emerald tools are in between diamond and netherite tools]_
